    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N P R S T U W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    B

    B() - Method in class canvas.CanvasData
     
    BackgroundRender - Class in render
    Utility class for generating theme-aware repeating dot-pattern backgrounds.
    BackgroundRender() - Constructor for class render.BackgroundRender
     
    baseSize - Variable in class brush.AbstractBrush
    Base brush size before speed scaling is applied.
    bg - Variable in class utils.themes.Theme
    Background color for UI and canvas.
    BG - Static variable in class canvas.CanvasData
    Background color index (theme-dependent).
    brush - package brush
     
    BrushController - Class in controller
    Controller responsible for managing all brush tools displayed in the BrushPane and handling brush selection logic.
    BrushController(BrushPane) - Constructor for class controller.BrushController
    Creates a controller that manages UI → brush selection behavior.
    BrushPane - Class in gui
    UI panel that displays all brush icons in a vertical toolbar.
    BrushPane() - Constructor for class gui.BrushPane
    Creates a brush toolbar panel that loads source icons, recolors them, displays them in a vertical list, and listens for theme changes.
    btnExit - Variable in class gui.MenuPane
    Exit button ("exit!!").
    btnExportGIF - Variable in class gui.MenuPane
     
    btnNewCanvas - Variable in class gui.MenuPane
     
    btnTheme - Variable in class gui.MenuPane
     
    btnUmm - Variable in class gui.MenuPane
    Left-side button group.
